videos.headline: Virginia Tech uses slick reverse for first TD
videos.description: Virginia Tech goes with a reverse to Jaylin Lane for a 7-yard touchdown and a lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia Tech uses slick reverse for first TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Collin Schlee keeps it for a Virginia Tech TD
videos.description: Virginia Tech scores its second touchdown of the game as quarterback Collin Schlee keeps it for a short score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Collin Schlee keeps it for a Virginia Tech TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Syracuse's Justus Ross-Simmons breaks tackle, speeds away for 55-yard TD
videos.description: Syracuse gets back into the game as Justus Ross-Simmons hauls in the short pass, breaks one tackle and takes off for a 55-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Syracuse’s Justus Ross-Simmons breaks tackle, speeds away for 55-yard TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
